title: Zombie Leather
description: A server-side mod to turn rotten flesh into leather
body:
A super simple server-side mod for Fabric that adds the ability to turn rotten flesh into leather.

## Features
- Using a campfire, you can turn rotten flesh into smoked rotten flesh, which can then be crafted into leather.
- Leatherworker villagers will trade smoked rotten flesh for emeralds.

To craft smoked rotten flesh into leather, put four in the crafting table (the shape doesn't matter).

![Crafting four smoked rotten flesh into leather.](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/f6b26a4f-78b6-4deb-8390-1a1afdd92b7a)

## Installation
This is a *server-side only* mod. When installed on a server, players can connect without installing anything. Installing on the client has no effect. Put the jar in your server's mods folder, and you're done!

To enable resource pack hosting, [install Polymer](https://modrinth.com/mod/polymer) and [enable AutoHost](https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/). Otherwise, the Smoked Rotten Flesh item will use the rabbit hide texture by default.

## Supported Languages:
- English (US)
- French (FR)
